query:
SELECT 
  data_referencia,
  MONTH(data_referencia) as mes, 
  YEAR(data_referencia) as ano, 
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM demonstrativo 
WHERE estabelecimentoId = 1
GROUP BY data_referencia
ORDER BY data_referencia DESC;
